## Checklist

- [ ] `npm test` passes
- [ ] Branch is up to date with `main`
- [ ] Commit messages follow [conventional commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/)
- [ ] If adding a feature, tests are included
- [ ] If fixing a bug, a regression test is included
- [ ] `AGENTS.md` is updated if the change affects skills or workflows
- [ ] `package-lock.json` or `node_modules/` are **not** committed
